reason: Single blue circular sign with a white arrow pointing down-left (mandatory direction of movement). Matches the stem 'the depicted road sign means'. The 33_2_0 candidates are a multi-sign option grid (end-of-restriction signs), not a single depicted sign.
Single green rectangular 'Motorway / автомагістраль' sign. Matches stem 'the depicted road sign indicates'. The 33_4_0 candidates are a multi-sign option grid; 33_2_0 belongs to another question.

Single green motorway sign with a diagonal red strike-through = 'End of motorway'. Matches stem 'the depicted road sign indicates'. The 33_6_0 candidates are a driving scene (U-turn near one-way signs), not a single sign; 33_4_0 is an option grid.
Single blue square sign with an upward white arrow = 'One-way road'. Matches stem 'is indicated by the depicted road sign'. 33_7_1 is a parking+bus combo, 33_8_0 is an option grid, 33_6_0 is a scene.

Single blue circular sign with white '50' = minimum-speed sign, which prescribes/allows movement at not less than the indicated speed. Matches stem 'the depicted road sign allows movement'. 33_9_0 is a scene; 33_11_0 is an option grid.

Single blue circular sign showing a pedestrian and a bicycle = 'Pedestrian and bicycle path', which allows movement of pedestrians and cyclists. Matches stem 'the depicted road sign allows movement'. 33_11_0 is an option grid.
Single blue circular sign with three white circular arrows = 'Roundabout' (круговий рух). Matches stem 'the depicted road sign indicates'. 33_14_0 is a driving scene (Б/А fork), not a single sign.

Single blue circular sign with a white car silhouette = motor-vehicle-only directional sign, allowing movement of the indicated vehicles. Matches stem 'the depicted road sign allows movement'. 33_15_0 is the roundabout sign (a different question).
